input: moq.analyzers issue #1057 follow-up: A test was previously named 'GenericCallbackValidation_CurrentLimitation_IsDocumented' and asserted that the analyzer did NOT produce a diagnostic for .Callback<int>(wrongTypeParam => { }) when the mocked method takes string. After PR #1030 introduced symbol-based detection, the callback type is resolved correctly and Moq1100 now fires. The fix renames the test to 'GenericCallbackWithWrongType_ProducesDiagnostic' and updates the expected diagnostic. Tests pass locally on Net80WithOldMoq and Net80WithNewMoq. CI pass pending. Anything to investigate before merging?
